name: testVerifyPlaceholdersEditForm
description: Verifies that all form field placeholders are set correctly
descriptionHtml: Verifies that all form field placeholders are set correctly

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verifies that all form field placeholders are set correctly

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Type '0731.192413 acquirer for edit form' into 'Select acquirer' field
Click '0731.192413 acquirer for edit form' in dropdown
Verify placeholders match expected values for all fields
